title: AI Native Learning Program
description: A practical curriculum for business individual contributors who need repeatable AI workflows, stronger review habits, and clearer judgment.

phases.title: AI Foundations
phases.focus: Start here to build your mental model, tool judgment, prompting habits, and safety discipline.
outcomes: Understand what AI is actually doing and where it fails.
Choose tools by workflow fit instead of hype.
Use prompts, context, and verification more deliberately.

phases.title: Productivity Acceleration
phases.focus: Apply the fundamentals to writing, synthesis, prompting, and meeting workflows you already own.
outcomes: Draft and revise faster without losing judgment.
Turn research and notes into usable outputs.
Build reusable prompt patterns for recurring work.

phases.title: Business Operations
phases.focus: Use AI on recurring operational work such as documentation, planning, analysis, and stakeholder communication.
outcomes: Turn recurring work into clearer workflows and artifacts.
Use AI for decision support without skipping evidence.
Handle communication and vendor work with more structure.

phases.title: Advanced AI Workflows
phases.focus: Move from single outputs into playbooks, embedded AI features, and practical agent-style workflows.
outcomes: Understand what changes in more agentic systems.
Package good work into reusable playbooks.
Support adoption through examples, not hype.

phases.title: AI Strategy & Leadership
phases.focus: Tie practical usage back to opportunity selection, governance, measurement, and sustainable learning.
outcomes: Spot high-value use cases more clearly.
Build a lightweight system for staying current.

recentUpdates.title: Structured content source introduced
recentUpdates.summary: The curriculum now builds from split JSON source files with validation instead of being maintained only as one large runtime JS file.

recentUpdates.title: Representative modules refreshed
recentUpdates.summary: Modules 1, 7, 14, 20, and the OpenClaw bonus section were strengthened with better sequence rationale, more specific exercises, and curated official resources.

recentUpdates.title: Key resources and review metadata added
recentUpdates.summary: Selected lessons and modules now surface official references, recent review dates, and clearer support for time-sensitive AI topics.
